item.title:

item.title: nickgoff79: Nick Goff @nickgoff79 · 7min No, the performance was not okay in either half, neither in the ‘big moments’ nor aside fro
item.description: Nick Goff @nickgoff79 · 7min No, the performance was not okay in either half, neither in the ‘big moments’ nor aside from them. And stfu about momentum. Do you know how stupid it sounds? We had it then we lost it and have to find it again? Who stole it, The Momentum Fairy? Utter nonsense. Cita Wolves @Wolves · 11h "We need to get momentum back and we can only do that by working extremely hard." 1 3 376

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 37min 'He's the best we've had over this trip - he's got two or three extra gears. I think th
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 37min 'He's the best we've had over this trip - he's got two or three extra gears. I think the King George is made for him'
Read the best quotes from the racing world this week De racingpost.com 1 1 mil
